data.name: cencerro
data.code: arrange([4, note("c4 eb4 c4 g4 c4 bb3 c4 g4").s("cb").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.35).lpf(2600).gain(0.42)], [8, note("c4 eb4 c4 g4 c4 bb3 c4 g4").s("cb").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.4).lpf(2600).delay(0.15).delayfeedback(0.3).gain(0.46)], [8, note("c4 eb4 g4 eb4 c4 bb3 ab3 g3").s("cb").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.4).lpf(2600).delay(0.15).gain(0.46)], [4, note("c4 eb4 c4 g4 c4 bb3 c4 g4").s("cb").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.3).lpf(1800).gain(0.34)])

data.name: kick
data.code: arrange([4, s("bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.18).gain(0.95)], [8, s("bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.18).gain(1)], [8, s("bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").shape(0.18).gain(1)], [4, s("bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").lpf(600).gain(0.7)])

data.name: snare lofi
data.code: arrange([4, s("~ ~ ~ ~ crate_rim ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ crate_rim ~ ~ ~").gain(0.5)], [8, s("~ ~ ~ ~ crate_sd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ crate_sd ~ ~ ~").room(0.14).gain(0.56)], [8, s("~ ~ ~ ~ crate_sd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ crate_sd ~ ~ crate_sd").room(0.14).gain(0.56)], [4, s("~ ~ ~ ~ crate_sd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ crate_sd ~ ~ ~").gain(0.44)])

data.name: hats trap
data.code: arrange([4, s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.22)], [8, s("hh*16").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.24)], [8, s("hh*16 , ~ ~ [hh hh hh] ~ ~ ~ [hh hh hh] ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.22)], [4, s("hh*8").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.14)])

data.name: 808 distorsion
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [8, note("<c1 c1 ab0 g0>").struct("x ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~ ~ ~").s("sine").slide(0.12).shape(0.4).distort(0.5).lpf(2200).gain(0.6)], [8, note("<c1 c1 ab0 g0>").struct("x ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~ ~ ~").s("sine").slide(0.12).shape(0.4).distort(0.5).lpf(2200).gain(0.6)], [4, silence])
